payload.evidence: The GitHub provenance continuation pins actions/attest-build-provenance v3.2.0 to verified commit 96278af6caaf10aea03fd8d33a09a777ca52d62f and pins privileged artifact download v8.0.1 to 3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c and bundle upload v7.0.1 to 043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a, and orders exact-five read-only build, isolated attestation, and read-only verify/execute jobs through immutable artifact handoffs. Only that non-executing three-action pinned job receives OIDC and attestation writes. Verification uses one exact certificate-identity mode plus repository, signer/source digest, source ref, artifact name/digest, event, runner, and transparency-log binding before execution. Every platform invokes finalization, execution proof, and receipt verification through the setup-python output. Capture and finalization disable bytecode before repository-local imports and the workflow exports PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1, so invoking receipt code cannot self-invalidate the clean candidate check with untracked Python caches. Candidate subprocess environments are reconstructed from a minimal launch/temp/locale/Windows allowlist plus four explicit trusted HARNESS_V1 bindings; GitHub command-file channels, Actions runtime/OIDC variables, tokens, Python injection, home, and cache state are absent. Build collectors repeat verification read-only and cross-bind the retained bundle and bounded verification record to the existing platform/target/runner/artifact-name/SHA-256 tuple. Real-CLI, static, and adversarial tests cover conflicting flags, missing or substituted attestations and privileged actions, identities, permissions, Python selection, environment injection, ordering, handoff, and authority overclaim. No remote workflow or Windows runner executed; Phase 6 live P0-P7, Windows safe publication/mutation, five-platform semantic equivalence, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, production signing, promotion, and Phase 8 remain pending or blocked.

payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its authoritative-state refusal","verified the official actions/attest-build-provenance v3.2.0 tag and pinned its peeled commit","verified official download-artifact v8.0.1 and upload-artifact v7.0.1 tags and pinned their full commits in the privileged job","split native build attestation and verify/execute into ordered artifact-handoff jobs","removed the mutually exclusive signer-workflow mode and retained exact certificate identity","used setup-python output explicitly on every platform","disabled repository bytecode before receipt-local imports and at workflow scope","replaced inherited-environment filtering with a minimal cross-platform allowlist and explicit trusted Harness bindings","retained and cross-bound public bundles and bounded verification records in closed receipts","repeated read-only provenance verification in execution and collection paths","added real-CLI static and adversarial workflow provenance tests","updated US-112 documentation and validation matrix","ran focused Phase 7 workspace framework and no-trust boundary validation without external mutation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["treat GitHub Sigstore provenance as authenticated only after successful exact-bundle verification","keep provenance diagnostic non-production non-promotable and distinct from production release signing","give id-token and attestation writes only to the isolated non-executing attestation job and pin every third-party action in that job","make candidate cleanliness precede every repository-local bytecode side effect","construct candidate environments from launch essentials instead of trying to enumerate dangerous inherited variables","use exact certificate identity with signer and source digest binding","preserve Windows publication and mutation as controlled unsupported","leave every US-112 proof flag zero and every acceptance promotion signing and Phase 8 authority blocked"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused because the pre-existing authoritative core state is unavailable and no database was initialized","independent review found mutually exclusive gh identity flags system-Python assumptions and OIDC authority co-located with candidate execution","re-review found mutable artifact transport actions in the privileged job and an incomplete inherited-environment denylist","CI run 29681895147 failed all five build rows because capture imported a local helper and created an untracked scripts/__pycache__ before clean-status validation","a separate provenance schema initially changed the signed Phase 1 path ledger, so the bounded record was instead closed inside the existing receipt contract without rewriting historical trust material","the no-trust premerge stops as designed at the external Phase 5 trusted-owner registry boundary"]
payload.files_read: ["AGENTS.md","docs/FEATURE_INTAKE.md","docs/CONTEXT_RULES.md","docs/TRACE_SPEC.md","docs/stories/US-112-v1-phase7-portability-release-proof","release/contracts/v1/schemas/build-receipt-v1.schema.json","scripts/v1_build_receipt_common.py","scripts/verify_v1_build_receipts.py","scripts/run_v1_phase7_execution_proof.py",".github/workflows/harness-v1-release.yml","GitHub Actions run 29681895147 failure summary","official actions/attest-build-provenance v3.2.0 repository and GitHub CLI attestation verification documentation","official actions/download-artifact v8.0.1 and actions/upload-artifact v7.0.1 release tags and repositories"]
payload.harness_friction: The required bootstrap cannot restore the verified core epoch because the pre-existing authoritative state is unavailable. Matrix queries and CLI-authored records remained unavailable, so this continuation preserves that state and supplies one additive replayable changeset without rewriting Symphony-owned history.
payload.notes: Detailed GitHub provenance trace. No remote attestation exists until an authorized sentinel workflow succeeds. No push, dispatch, main mutation, tag, release, package, publish, production signing, private key, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, promotion, or Phase 8 action occurred. Duration and token estimates are unavailable.
payload.task_summary: Implemented verified GitHub Sigstore provenance gates for Phase 7 native diagnostic artifacts
